ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biological_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological process */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Gene Ontology identifier for the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological process */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the biological process */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* Parent process ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene interaction */,
  "gene_a" TEXT /* First gene in the interaction */,
  "gene_b" TEXT /* Second gene in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the interaction */,
  "interaction_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression entry */,
  "gene" TEXT /* Gene associated with the expression data */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological process */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change in expression */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the expression change */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment from which the data is derived */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample used in the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the expression data */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for data analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES biological_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene ontology term */,
  "go_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene ontology term */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the gene ontology term (e.g., biological process) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the gene ontology term */,
  "parent_go_id" TEXT /* Parent GO term ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., institution) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Explicit permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the visualization represents */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created it */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, heatmap) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member is part of */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the member left the project */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the member's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first project in the collaboration */,
  "project_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second project in the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., joint research, data sharing) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("project_id_b") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("project_id_a") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project generating the output */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., publication, report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the output document */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Format of the output (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_outputs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
